mapper.insert: INSERT INTO study_applications ( application_id, post_id, user_id, message, status, created_at ) VALUES ( seq_study_applications.NEXTVAL, #{postId}, #{userId}, #{message}, 'PENDING', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM study_applications WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 'APPROVED'

SELECT a.application_id , a.post_id , a.user_id , a.message , a.status , a.created_at , u.name AS applicant_name , p.title AS post_title FROM study_applications a JOIN user_account u ON a.user_id = u.user_id JOIN study_posts p ON a.post_id = p.post_id WHERE a.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY a.application_id DESC

SELECT a.application_id , a.post_id , a.user_id , a.message , a.status , a.created_at , u.name AS applicant_name , p.title AS post_title FROM study_applications a JOIN user_account u ON a.user_id = u.user_id JOIN study_posts p ON a.post_id = p.post_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.application_id DESC

SELECT a.application_id , a.post_id , a.user_id , a.message , a.status , a.created_at , u.name AS applicant_name , p.title AS post_title FROM study_applications a JOIN user_account u ON a.user_id = u.user_id JOIN study_posts p ON a.post_id = p.post_id WHERE a.application_id = #{applicationId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM study_applications WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 'APPROVED'
